review.summary: 69-word script across 5 beats; covers chlorophyll capture, O2 release, CO2 fixation, and equation landing.

voice_performance.performance_intent: Friendly science teacher—curious hook, clear middle, confident landing.
voice_performance.energy_curve: bright hook, steady explanatory middle, punchy equation close
voice_performance.pause_policy: Micro-pause after hook; brief beat before the equation landing.

provider_notes.openai: Voice ash. Instructions: warm educational narrator, upbeat but clear, emphasize 'oxygen' and 'photosynthesis' on the close.

sections.label: Hook
sections.text: Every breath you take started inside a leaf. Thirty seconds—here's photosynthesis.
sections.speaker_directions: Bright and inviting; slight lift on 'every breath'. Crisp pivot into the promise.

delivery_cues.delivery_note: Hook should feel like a dare, not a lecture intro.
delivery_cues.provider_text: Every breath you take started inside a leaf. <break time="0.4s"/> Thirty seconds—here's photosynthesis.

enhancement_cues.description: hero_title: 'Photosynthesis in 30 Seconds' with leaf icon pulse

sections.label: Setup
sections.text: In chloroplasts, chlorophyll traps sunlight—the spark that powers the whole process.

delivery_cues.provider_text: In chloroplasts, chlorophyll traps sunlight—the spark that powers the whole process.

enhancement_cues.description: Stylized chloroplast cross-section with sun rays hitting chlorophyll

sections.source_ref: Chlorophyll absorbs light energy in chloroplasts

sections.label: Build — Light reactions
sections.text: That light splits water apart, releasing the oxygen we breathe right now.
sections.speaker_directions: Matter-of-fact wonder; hit 'oxygen' with gentle emphasis.

delivery_cues.delivery_note: Connect abstract chemistry to the listener's body.
delivery_cues.provider_text: That light splits water apart, releasing the oxygen we breathe right now.

enhancement_cues.description: H2O icon splits; O2 molecules float upward with glow

sections.source_ref: Water splits to release O2 during light-dependent reactions

sections.label: Build — Carbon fixation
sections.text: At the same time, carbon dioxide from the air is stitched into sugar—plant fuel.
sections.speaker_directions: Slightly slower on 'carbon dioxide' and 'sugar'; keep momentum.

delivery_cues.delivery_note: Second half of the equation—make the invisible gas tangible.
delivery_cues.provider_text: At the same time, carbon dioxide from the air is stitched into sugar—plant fuel.

enhancement_cues.description: CO2 molecules flow into leaf; glucose hexagon assembles

sections.source_ref: CO2 fixed into sugars in Calvin cycle

sections.label: Landing
sections.text: Sunlight, water, and CO₂ in; oxygen and sugar out. Life's solar engine.
sections.speaker_directions: Confident recap; punch 'solar engine' as the mic-drop line.

delivery_cues.delivery_note: Equation rhythm: in/out pairs, then the name of the process.
delivery_cues.provider_text: <break time="0.3s"/> Sunlight, water, and CO₂ in; oxygen and sugar out. Life's solar engine.
